purpose: Decide when characters/<id>/past.yaml can be included in scene_contract.

allowed_triggers.description: The scene explicitly enters a flashback or memory sequence.
A character with valid knowledge says or asks about a past fact in-scene.
The scene goal explicitly says to process a past event, trauma, memory, document, or confession.
A meaningful object/place/date directly connected to past.yaml is active and noticed.
Current calendar slice marks a past-related beat as active now.
character_memory contains an active open hook that directly points to a past event and current scene touches it.

not_valid_triggers: another unloaded file contains the information
relationship tension exists but no past fact is currently surfaced

load_modes.none: past.yaml is not included; hidden facts go to forbidden_context if risky.
load_modes.narrow_slice: Only the relevant past block is included with exact trigger and who knows it.
load_modes.full_past: Allowed only for explicit flashback/author-debug/context-audit, not normal scene generation.

required_when_loaded: past_load_reason must be non-null in loaded_characters.source_files
visible_knowledge_boundaries must state who knows and who does not know the past fact
forbidden_context must state which related facts are still not available
